zh.lifeSummary: 當Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton於大約1190年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾塞頓 奧 特倫特時，他的父親Lord Hervey de Sutton23歲，母親Elizabeth D'Evereux21歲。他於1215年之前與Alice Lexington在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1258年在英國諾廷加姆爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton于大约1190年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾塞頓 奧 特倫特时，他的父亲Lord Hervey de Sutton23岁，母亲Elizabeth D'Evereux21岁。他于1215年之前与Alice Lexington在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1258年在英国諾廷加姆爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Rowland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roland  , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Roland
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + land ‘land, territory’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In Old French literature it is borne by a legendary Frankish hero, a vassal of Charlemagne, whose exploits are told in the Chanson de Roland. The subject of the poem is Roland's death at the Battle of Roncesvalles in the Pyrenees in 778 , while protecting the rearguard of the Frankish army on its retreat from Spain. Roland is depicted in literature and legend as headstrong and impulsive. His devoted friendship with the prudent Oliver is also legendary.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton was born about 1190, in Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Lord Hervey de Sutton, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth D'Evereux, was 21. He married Alice Lexington before 1215, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1258, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton est né environ 1190, à Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Hervey de Sutton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth D'Evereux, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alice Lexington avant 1215, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1258, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton um 1190 in Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Hervey de Sutton 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth D'Evereux 21. it.lifeSummary: Quando Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton è nato il circa 1190 nel Sutton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Hervey de Sutton, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth D'Evereux, aveva 21 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Suttonが約1190年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスットオン オン トレントで生まれた時，父Lord Hervey de Suttonは23歳，母Elizabeth D'Evereuxは21歳であった。1215年以前にイギリスでAlice Lexingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1258年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 노틴그함실르 수턴  트렌트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Hervey de Sutton(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth D'Evereux(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1215년 이전 영국에서 Alice Lexington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1258년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rowland de Sutton 5th Lord of Sutton родился около 1190 г. в местности суттон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Hervey de Sutton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth D'Evereux, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Lexington перед 1215 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1258 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.
